title: COHO Analytics — Data Source Schema Template
description: Schema.org Dataset-compatible template for documenting data sources in the COHO Housing Analytics platform. Use this template to generate JSON-LD markup for each registered dataset.

DataCatalog.name: COHO Analytics Data Catalog
DataCatalog.description: Unified inventory of 50+ data sources powering the Colorado Housing Analytics platform. Covers LIHTC, demographics, economic indicators, market data, GIS, and policy datasets.

id.description: Unique machine-readable identifier for the data source. Used as key in cross-references and URL fragments.

name.description: Human-readable name of the data source.

category.description: Thematic category grouping for the source.

provider.description: Organization that publishes or maintains the primary data source.

url.description: Canonical URL of the upstream data provider or dataset landing page.

localFile.description: Relative path to the cached local copy of the data file within this repository.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 date string of the most recent data refresh.

maxAgeDays.description: Maximum acceptable age in days before the source is considered stale. Used to compute freshness score.

geoUnit.description: Geographic unit of observation for spatial data.

coverage.description: Human-readable description of geographic or thematic coverage.

features.description: Approximate number of records, features, or data points in the dataset.

description.description: Full human-readable description of the dataset, including key fields and use cases.

tags.description: Searchable keyword tags for the dataset.

apiEndpoint.description: Live API endpoint if the source supports real-time or on-demand queries.

alternatives.description: Alternative sources or related resources providing similar data.

whereUsed.description: List of dashboard pages that consume this data source, enabling traceability from source to visualization.

page.description: Relative filename of the consuming dashboard page.

label.description: Human-readable name of the consuming page.

section.description: Specific section, chart, or component within the page that uses this source.

freshnessThresholds.aging: Days since update between 70%–100% of maxAgeDays
